task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'Projects' workspace in Nuxeo.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Nuxeo web interface shows the 'Projects' workspace open, displaying its contents.

task_completion.description: Locate and open the 'Q3 Marketing Report' document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Q3 Marketing Report' document is clicked or its document view is displayed.

task_completion.description: Access the edit or properties screen of the document to update the thumbnail.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The edit form or properties tab for the 'Q3 Marketing Report' is visible, showing fields that can be modified.

task_completion.description: Select the correct image file to upload as the new thumbnail.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file picker dialog or file manager shows the file '/home/ga/nuxeo/data/report_cover.jpg' being selected for upload.

task_completion.description: Save the changes and verify the new thumbnail is applied.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The document view or edit screen shows the updated thumbnail, which should appear as a blue-red gradient image.

task_completion.description: Ensure the main document file remains unchanged.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main file attachment, 'annual_report_2023.pdf', is still visible and listed as the primary file on the document view, indicating it was not deleted or replaced.

integrity.description: The agent used the Nuxeo web interface to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser displaying the Nuxeo UI, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent uploaded the specific local file requested.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file picker or upload action clearly references the local path '/home/ga/nuxeo/data/report_cover.jpg', not an image downloaded from the internet.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal is not used to execute curl commands, python scripts, or Nuxeo API calls to update the document directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The document is located at /default-domain/workspaces/Projects/Q3-Marketing-Report. The thumbnail image to upload is located at /home/ga/nuxeo/data/report_cover.jpg, which is a 640x480 blue-red gradient image. The main document file is 'annual_report_2023.pdf' and must remain attached to the document after the thumbnail update.
